description: Normalized archtop graduation template. Shape is universal across makers; absolute values are derived from wood properties via plate_design calculator.
derivation: Derived from D'Aquisto measurements (photographed sketch) + Benedetto 17 reference points. Proportions consistent across both instruments confirming universality.
usage: Multiply normalized values by (apex_mm - edge_mm) then add edge_mm to get absolute thickness at each zone.

top.arch_height_note: D'Aquisto: 5/8in (~15.9mm) on ~255mm lower bout = 0.062. Classic range 0.055-0.070.

back.arch_height_note: D'Aquisto: 3/4in (~19.1mm) on ~255mm lower bout = 0.075. Back arch typically higher than top.

implementation_note: The absolute endpoints (edge_mm, apex_mm) should come from tap_tone_pi.design.analyze_plate() or analyze_coupled_system(). The arch_height should come from arch_height_fraction * actual_lower_bout_width_mm. Neither is currently wired — see BACKLOG.md PORT-001 and ARCH-001.
